---
name: Privacy/security report
description: Report a privacy or security concern (do not include sensitive details here)
title: "[Privacy/Security]: "
labels: ["privacy", "security"]
---

## Before you post

Do not paste private prompts, responses, documents, or full conversation content here. Describe the issue and where it occurs; see [`SECURITY.md`](../../SECURITY.md) for how to share sensitive detail privately if needed.

## What does this issue involve?

- [ ] Prompts
- [ ] Model responses
- [ ] Conversations (stored or in-memory)
- [ ] Uploaded documents
- [ ] Local technical logs
- [ ] Diagnostic reports
- [ ] Unexpected network traffic (a request that shouldn't happen, or unexpected data in a request)
- [ ] Something else (describe below)

## What happened?

Describe the issue and, if possible, the exact page/flow where it occurs (for example, `/chat`, `/debug`, a specific button).

## Expected behavior

What should have happened instead, per the privacy/security guarantees in [`docs/privacy.md`](../../docs/privacy.md) and [`docs/security.md`](../../docs/security.md)?

## Evidence (redacted)

If you have a diagnostic report, network request, or log entry showing the issue, paste it here with any prompt/response/document/conversation text removed or replaced with placeholders.

## Browser and OS

Approximate browser and OS.
